errors.404_detail: The requested resource does not exist. Please check if the ID is correct or the resource has been deleted.
errors.400_detail: Request parameters are invalid or missing required fields. Please check the API documentation.
errors.500_detail: The server encountered an unexpected error. Please try again later. If the problem persists, contact the administrator.
errors.401_detail: Valid authentication credentials are required. Please check your API Key configuration.
errors.403_detail: You do not have permission to perform this operation. Please contact the project administrator.
errors.429_detail: Request rate limit exceeded. Please retry after {retry_after} seconds.
errors.rate_limit_detail: Current API call rate is {current_rate}/min, exceeding the limit of {limit}/min. Consider reducing request frequency or upgrading your plan.
errors.db_error_detail: Database operation failed: {message}. Please check if the database file is readable/writable.
errors.file_error_detail: File operation on {path} failed: {message}. Please check disk space and file permissions.
errors.llm_timeout_detail: LLM service {provider} timed out ({timeout}s). Possible causes: 1) Network instability 2) Model service busy 3) Request too large. Suggestions: check network, or reduce request complexity.

api.feedback_submitted: Thank you for your feedback! We will continuously improve based on ratings.
api.approval_pending: This operation requires your approval. Please check the approval page for details.
